description_long: This object consists of three plush, square pillows and a draped, soft blanket or throw, all arranged in a loosely grouped manner. The pillows have a slightly overstuffed appearance with visible creases and gentle folds, suggesting a soft and comfortable texture. The blanket is casually draped over the central pillow, with its ends hanging down, adding a sense of casual comfort. The surfaces of the pillows and blanket are smooth and unadorned, with no visible patterns, logos, or tags. The overall color is a uniform, light shade, likely white or off-white, giving a clean and neutral look. This set would typically be found in a domestic or urban relaxation setting, such as on a sofa, bench, or outdoor lounge area.
description: A set of three soft, square pillows and a draped blanket, all in a solid light color with a plush, comfortable appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three pillows and the blanket draped over the central pillow, with the arrangement clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness and plushness of the pillows, with the blanket's drape and folds more pronounced.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back sides of the pillows and the blanket, with the pillows spread apart and the blanket's length visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the depth and contours of the pillows and the way the blanket falls over them.
